name: Stack Z-Projection Statistical Comparison
description: You are a neuroimaging researcher comparing data reduction methods. Analyze the statistical properties of different Z-projection methods on the 'MRI Stack' sample image. Generate five Z-projections of the stack: Max Intensity, Average Intensity, Min Intensity, Sum Slices, and Standard Deviation. For each projection, measure the Mean, StdDev, Min, and Max. Compile these statistics into a CSV file saved to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/zprojection_comparison.csv' with columns for 'Projection_Type', 'Mean', 'StdDev', 'Min', and 'Max'. Additionally, save the 'Standard Deviation' projection image as a TIFF file to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/stddev_projection.tif'.
